metadata.title: Mohammed Boussardi — Enterprise & Oracle APEX Consultant
metadata.description: Professional portfolio of Mohammed Boussardi. Oracle APEX, HRIS, Workforce Management, and business process digitization specialist.
metadata.keywords: Mohammed Boussardi, Oracle APEX, HRIS, WFM, Chronotime, consultant, Morocco, mboussardi.ma

hero.title: Enterprise Applications Consultant
hero.subtitle: Oracle APEX · HRIS & WFM · Digital Transformation
hero.description: Specialized in Oracle ecosystems and HR information systems. I support organizations in digitizing their business processes, configuring workforce management solutions, and delivering high-stakes enterprise projects.

about.title: Where technology meets business value
about.paragraph1: I am a solutions-driven consultant operating in demanding enterprise environments where technical rigor and functional understanding go hand in hand. My career has led me to work on HR digitization projects, workforce and time management system configuration, and business application development using Oracle APEX.
about.paragraph2: Currently engaged at Inetum in an offshore context, I work on the configuration and optimization of Chronotime — a workforce management solution — in close collaboration with functional teams and business stakeholders.
about.paragraph3: My value lies in combining technical expertise, functional awareness, and coordination skills to deliver reliable outcomes aligned with organizational goals.

roles.title: HRIS / WFM Consultant — Chronotime
roles.description: Configuration and setup of Chronotime in an offshore HRIS environment. Working on calculation rules, scheduling models, process alignment, and coordination with functional teams.

roles.title: Oracle APEX Consultant
roles.description: Development of business applications using Oracle APEX for integration and automation missions. Involved in electronic signature, secure workflows, and pension fund-related projects.

roles.title: Oracle APEX Consultant (via Popay)
roles.description: Submission and engagement on a project for Morocco's central bank. Contributed to Oracle APEX application development with Oracle E-Business Suite integration, in a context demanding high reliability and compliance.

roles.title: Online Instructor — IT & Programming
roles.description: Guided students and professionals in programming, databases, and web technologies. Strengthened pedagogical and technical communication skills.

roles.title: Intern — Development & Systems
roles.description: End-of-studies internship focused on internal tool development and understanding industrial information systems in a production context.

domains.title: Enterprise Applications
domains.description: Design and development of robust business applications tailored to the processes and requirements of large organizations.

domains.title: Oracle Ecosystem
domains.description: Oracle APEX, PL/SQL, Oracle EBS, Oracle databases — end-to-end mastery of the Oracle stack for enterprise projects.

domains.title: HRIS & Workforce Management
domains.description: Configuration and setup of workforce and time management solutions. Chronotime, calculation rules, scheduling models.

domains.title: Workflow & Automation
domains.description: Process digitization: electronic signatures, secure workflows, business flow automation, and validation chains.

domains.title: Coordination & Delivery
domains.description: Project coordination, requirements gathering, functional documentation, and structured delivery in multi-stakeholder environments.

domains.title: Integration & APIs
domains.description: System integration via REST, web services, and connectors. Focused on interoperability and data consistency.

items.title: Chronotime Configuration — Offshore WFM
items.challenge: Configure and optimize calculation rules and workforce management models in a multi-client context.
items.contribution: Full configuration, rule validation, coordination with functional teams, configuration documentation.
items.impact: Reliable time calculations and alignment with client business requirements.

items.title: Oracle APEX Applications — HR & Payroll Processes
items.challenge: Develop business applications to support HR and payroll management processes in an Oracle environment.
items.contribution: APEX development, PL/SQL modeling, Oracle EBS integration, functional testing.
items.tools: Oracle APEX, PL/SQL, Oracle EBS, REST API
items.impact: Automation of manual processes and reduced processing times.

items.title: Electronic Signature — Pension Funds
items.challenge: Implement a secure electronic signature workflow for pension fund validation operations.
items.contribution: Workflow design, signature integration, flow security, business validation.
items.tools: Oracle APEX, PL/SQL, Electronic Signature, Workflows
items.impact: Complete security and traceability of the validation process.

items.title: Bank Al-Maghrib Project
items.challenge: Operate in a high-compliance, high-reliability environment for Morocco's central bank.
items.contribution: Oracle APEX development, Oracle EBS integration, adherence to security and compliance standards.
items.tools: Oracle APEX, Oracle EBS, PL/SQL, Web Services
items.impact: Delivery compliant with institutional standards and successful integration.

pmo.title: Organizational maturity & coordination
pmo.description: Beyond technical execution, I bring a structured, professional approach to every engagement.

capabilities.title: Requirements Gathering
capabilities.description: Active listening, requirements formalization, translation into operational specifications.

capabilities.title: Structured Documentation
capabilities.description: Functional, technical, and configuration documentation writing.

capabilities.title: Project Coordination
capabilities.description: Deliverable tracking, priority alignment, reporting, and progress management.

capabilities.title: Structured Delivery
capabilities.description: Deadline adherence, deliverable quality, and risk anticipation.

capabilities.title: Business Alignment
capabilities.description: Understanding business challenges and translating them into tailored technical solutions.

items.degree: Engineering Degree in Information Systems and Management
items.description: Currently pursuing an engineering degree focused on information systems, digital management, business processes, and modern technology solutions for organizations.

items.degree: Technical University Degree, System and Network Administration

items.description: Studied system and network administration with practical training in IT infrastructure, network configuration, system maintenance, and technical support.

contact.title: Let's connect
contact.description: Have a project, a mission, or an opportunity? Feel free to reach out. I am available for consulting engagements, application development, and enterprise project coordination.
